feed.title: SkillsLLM

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, and Glama (blog + release notes)

entry.title: claude-tdd-pro
entry.content: Drop-in plugin that elevates any codebase to Google's published engineering standards (eng-practices, JS/TS style, Python style). /analyze produces a citable compliance report; /remediate executes a small-CL plan that ratchets the codebase toward the bar; every greenfield prompt is gated by the same RUBRIC.yaml. Hardened against prompt-injection, secret-leakage, and protected-branch commits. Auto-disclosure via Assisted-by: trailer.

entry.title: agent-orchestra
entry.content: Multi-agent workflow system for Claude Code. Pipeline-based agent orchestration: Issue → Design → Plan → Implement → Review → PR.

entry.title: token-optimizer
entry.content: Audit, fix, and monitor Claude Code context window usage. Find the ghost tokens.

entry.title: vruum
entry.content: Vruum AI skills + remote MCP server for managed outbound. Slash commands for prospect enrichment and reply diagnosis, paired with the full Vruum MCP tool surface over OAuth 2.1.

entry.title: muse-derivative
entry.content: MUSE 衍生写作姊妹包：同人 / 续写 / 番外 / 跨风格改编。入口 derivative-writing 与 muse-writing 主干几乎一致——跑 pipeline 前用 init_derivative_run.py 按 reuse_mode（fan_fiction/sequel/spin_off/cross_style_rewrite）把原作可继承的 phase 设计 yaml 从 canon 蒸馏物 / 用户已有 pipeline 预置到 work_dir，phase1-5 检测到已有 yaml 就在其上完善（否则从零生成），下游消费与 muse-writing 一致。自含整条衍生 pipeline（phase0-7 + 辅助 skill）；可选依赖 muse-canon-distill 取蒸馏物作继承基线。

entry.title: leerie
entry.content: Deterministic, headless task orchestrator for Claude Code. Classifies a task, decomposes it into granular subtasks, schedules them into dependency-ordered waves, and executes each in an isolated git worktree under an evidence-gated implement/validate loop. Runs entirely on the Claude Code CLI/subscription via `claude -p` workers.

entry.title: codebrief-capture
entry.content: Codebrief intent capture — distills developer intent locally at session end, after a git push, or after a PR is created, and sends only derived annotations (never code) to your Codebrief workspace.

entry.title: context-harness
entry.content: Local-first personal AI context loop for Code Agent conversations.

entry.title: memstack
entry.content: 128 battle-tested skills for Claude Code. Session memory, git workflows, database migrations, security scanning, deployments, and more. Auto-trigger commands and project handoffs via markdown-based skills.

entry.title: pagerangers-seo
entry.content: PageRangers SEO API integration for AI assistants

entry.title: git-workflow
entry.content: Git workflow best practices with commit validation hooks

entry.title: Wachines-Plugin-Ironman
entry.content: Software factory toolkit for Claude Code: Postgres/Supabase & React/Next best practices, SQL-migration & security reviewers, docs architect, RPC-API contract, functional front QA, and the wachi-fabrica orchestrator — plus db/frontend/security subagents. Project-agnostic.

entry.title: whiteboard
entry.content: Collaborative Excalidraw whiteboard for Claude Code. Wraps the @kamiazya/whiteboard-mcp server and exposes the shared skills bundled with that package.

entry.title: randkit
entry.content: Teach Claude Code and agentic tools to correctly perform tasks involving randomness

entry.title: feature-forge
entry.content: End-to-end feature development pipeline: PRD → tech spec → implementation specs → backlog → documentation, with verification gates, pipeline state tracking, and specialized subagents for verification and codebase research.

entry.title: dream-studio
entry.content: Dream Studio — local-first AI orchestration and operational intelligence platform.

entry.title: resy-mcp
entry.content: Resy reservation management for Claude — search restaurants, book tables, manage reservations, favorites, and Priority Notify via natural language

entry.title: frontend-visualqa
entry.content: Local visual QA for frontends with Yutori Navigator and Playwright

entry.title: swift-architecture-skill
entry.content: Swift iOS architecture guidance and playbooks for MVVM, MVI, TCA, Clean Architecture, VIPER, MVP, Coordinator, and Reactive patterns. Use when designing, implementing, refactoring, or reviewing the architecture of a SwiftUI or UIKit feature, module, or codebase.

entry.title: episteme
entry.content: The epistemic-posture layer for AI coding agents. Ships the Reasoning Surface protocol, named failure-mode counters, operator profile schema, and workflow loop as Claude Code skills, agents, and hooks. Posture first. Kernel outlives the tooling.

entry.title: druckenmiller
entry.content: Daily Druckenmiller conviction analysis. Fetches today's conviction score, 4-signal breakdown, and position recommendation from a live data pipeline.

entry.title: skill-inject
entry.content: Local, model-agnostic automatic skill injection: embeds the prompt on CPU, ranks it against your skill descriptions, and injects the matching skill only when one actually fits — via UserPromptSubmit/PostToolUse/SessionStart hooks. No API call, nothing leaves your machine.

entry.title: superpowers-gstack
entry.content: Routing, context management, and project setup for the Superpowers + GStack workflow

entry.title: anvil
entry.content: Local-first, runtime-neutral project state for humans and AI coding agents — turn PRDs into lockable, evidence-backed work packets.

entry.title: huggingface-skills
entry.content: Agent Skills for AI/ML tasks including dataset creation, model training, evaluation, and research paper publishing on Hugging Face Hub

entry.title: search-research
entry.content: Unified search and research system with async concurrent execution, HyDE enhancement, and 11 web providers. Replaces deprecated unified-search (EOL: 2026-09-01). pip-installable Python library with Claude Code plugin layer.

entry.title: clickhouse-monitor
entry.content: Specialized assistance for the chmonitor dashboard - a real-time monitoring dashboard for ClickHouse clusters

entry.title: typo3-upgrade-effort-model
entry.content: Generic TYPO3 LTS upgrade effort model: per-version risk multipliers (v14: Fluid 5 strict VHs, HashService removal, TSFE removal, asset-pipeline removal), breaking-change baselines, version-compatibility matrix, Rector coverage adjustments, and a 7-phase assessment workflow. Calibration-free — pair with your own historical project data for tuned estimates.

entry.title: fleet
entry.content: Agent dashboard TUI — tracks AI agent state via hooks for the fleet CLI

entry.title: tla-rs
entry.content: TLA+ model checker as MCP tools — validate specs, list invariants, run checks, and replay counterexamples directly from Claude Code.

entry.title: amaris-consulting
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Amaris Consulting branded deliverables, brand tools, and strategic deliverable planning

entry.title: agentheim
entry.content: DDD-flavored agentic harness: Socratic vision modeling, bounded contexts, parallel workers, decision records

entry.title: metate
entry.content: Full development pipeline as Claude Code skills: discover -> prep -> build -> review -> smoke -> aftercare -> ship. The implementer (cursor/codex/claude/gemini) is the only writer and its build session is resumed across review rounds. Project specifics live in .metate/profile.yml; the skills are codebase-agnostic.

entry.title: sodax-skills
entry.content: sodax-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: clavain
entry.content: Self-improving agent rig: codifies product and engineering discipline into composable workflows from brainstorm to ship. Compounds knowledge, generates domain agents, monitors its own docs, and surfaces conservative update drift. Orchestrates Claude, Codex, and Oracle through 6 agents, 54 commands, 19 skills, 0 MCP servers. Factory substrate: CXDB turn DAG, scenario bank with satisfaction scoring, evidence pipeline, agent capability policies. Companions: interspect, interphase, interline, interflux, interpath, interwatch, interslack, interform, intercraft, interdev, interpeer, intertest.

entry.title: impeccable
entry.content: Design fluency for frontend development. 1 skill with 23 commands (/impeccable polish, /impeccable audit, /impeccable critique, etc.) and curated anti-pattern detection.

entry.title: jaas
entry.content: Teach Claude to author and operate JaaS — evaluate Jsonnet over HTTP, and publish JsonnetSnippet / JsonnetLibrary resources as Flux ExternalArtifacts.

entry.title: cccp
entry.content: CCCP — Claude-to-Claude Communication Protocol. Live chat, presence, and file sharing between Claude agents across machines and accounts.

entry.title: sensitive-canary
entry.content: Blocks secrets and PII before they reach the Anthropic API

entry.title: odin
entry.content: ODIN (Outline Driven INtelligence) - Advanced code agent with diagram-first engineering and atomic commit workflows for surgical precision in software development

entry.title: feature-flow
entry.content: Full feature development lifecycle — design docs, verification, acceptance criteria, and automated checks. Requires superpowers plugin.

entry.title: sherpa
entry.content: Develop like a sherpa: composable /spec, /plan, and /implement skills — one per layer (macro, step, build) — with bundled scout/review/build subagents and adversarial pressure at every boundary. The user composes the workflow; sherpa offers the tools. Nothing runs unasked, nothing persists unless you call /persist. Project-agnostic; extend with project packs.

entry.title: v3.4.2
entry.content:
v3.4.2: Heads Up

FastMCP 3.4.2 restores JWT compatibility for providers that include private, non-critical JWS header parameters. Tokens from providers like Clerk can carry header metadata such as cat without being rejected before signature and claim validation, while unsupported critical headers are still rejected.

Fixes 🐞

  • Allow private JWT headers by @jlowin in #4290

Docs 📚

  • Docs: add v3.4.1 changelog entries by @jlowin in #4289

Full Changelog: v3.4.1...v3.4.2

entry.title: v3.4.3
entry.content:
v3.4.3: The Fast and the Secure-ious

FastMCP 3.4.3 closes out a month of SSRF and OAuth hardening: NAT64, 6to4, Teredo, and ISATAP transition addresses can no longer smuggle private IPv4 targets past the SSRF allow-list, Streamable HTTP now validates Host and Origin before session handling to block DNS rebinding against localhost-bound servers, and OAuth redirect validation rejects unsafe schemes and unregistered DCR redirect URIs. Alongside the security work, this release also fixes proxy session teardown races, discriminator-tag handling in JSON schema conversion, and several smaller reliability issues.

Enhancements ✨

  • Dedupe discriminator-required helper across schema converters by @jlowin in #4362
  • Add real Monty sandbox e2e coverage for CodeMode call_tool by @AlexlaGuardia in #4274
  • Switch prettier hook to rbubley/mirrors-prettier by @jlowin in #4366
  • feat(remote): add --verify flag for TLS certificate verification by @jlowin in #4369

Security 🔒

  • fix(deps): clear Dependabot security alerts via lockfile bumps by @jlowin in #4393
  • Clarify resource path parameter safety by @jlowin in #4398
  • Fix dev apps launch escaping by @jlowin in #4399
  • Block NAT64 SSRF bypass by @jlowin in #4400
  • [codex] Fix event store replay isolation by @jlowin in #4402
  • Fix DCR redirect URI validation by @jlowin in #4408
  • Protect streamable HTTP from DNS rebinding by @jlowin in #4405
  • Block unsafe OAuth redirect schemes by @jlowin in #4419
  • Block IPv6 transition SSRF bypasses by @jlowin in #4426

Fixes 🐞

  • fix: caching middleware TypeError on cache miss due to mismatched call_next parameter by @gmenziesint in #4301
  • Fix: async rate limiting middleware get_client_id callbacks by @Chotom in #4319
  • Recognize all GitHub issue-link forms in require-issue-link workflow by @jlowin in #4359
  • fix: preserve required discriminator tags by @he-yufeng in #4297
  • fix(proxy): shield stateful proxy disconnect during session teardown by @jlowin in #4363
  • fix(fs): isolate same-named package imports across providers by @jlowin in #4361
  • fix: StatefulProxyClient.clear() no longer causes KeyError on session teardown by @tcconnally in #4328
  • fix: guard recursive refs in json_schema_to_type by @Epochex in #4312
  • Forward IdP auth errors to MCP client instead of showing HTML error page by @bobbyjames839 in #4293
  • fix(resources): round-trip path values with reserved characters in URI templates by @jlowin in #4368
  • fix: bracket IPv6 hosts in server startup log URL by @jlowin in #4372
  • fix: bound default OIDC discovery timeout and expose it on provider wrappers by @jlowin in #4374
  • fix: validate task tool arguments against declared types by @jlowin in #4373
  • fix(tools): honor serialize_by_alias in tool result serialization by @jlowin in #4391
  • Fix/cimd flow issue by @twjackysu in #4206
  • Reject empty env var keys by @CodingFeng101 in #4410
  • fix: correct replace_type docstring parameter descriptions by @hiSandog in #4375
  • Fix ty 0.0.55 diagnostics and prefab-ui protocol version drift by @jlowin in #4428
  • [codex] Fix OpenAPI resource template requests by @jlowin in #4407

Docs 📚

  • fix: RST docstrings in fastmcp.types render raw on gofastmcp.com by @jlowin in #4367
  • docs: fix 5 broken internal links (auth & providers pages) by @Michael-WhiteCapData in #4344
  • docs: add audit/event-record recipe for tool-call middleware by @AlexlaGuardia in #4345

Dependencies 📦

  • chore(deps): bump actions/checkout from 6 to 7 by @dependabot in #4343
  • chore(deps): bump joserfc from 1.6.5 to 1.6.7 in the uv group across 1 directory by @dependabot in #4394
  • chore(deps): bump joserfc from 1.6.7 to 1.6.8 in the uv group across 1 directory by @dependabot in #4429

Other Changes 🦾

  • Raise fastmcp.ValidationError for invalid tool arguments by @jlowin in #4392
  • Fix versioned auth middleware checks by @jlowin in #4401

New Contributors

  • @gmenziesint made their first contribution in #4301
  • @Chotom made their first contribution in #4319
  • @he-yufeng made their first contribution in #4297
  • @AlexlaGuardia made their first contribution in #4274
  • @tcconnally made their first contribution in #4328
  • @Epochex made their first contribution in #4312
  • @Michael-WhiteCapData made their first contribution in #4344
  • @bobbyjames839 made their first contribution in #4293
  • @twjackysu made their first contribution in #4206
  • @CodingFeng101 made their first contribution in #4410
  • @hiSandog made their first contribution in #4375

Full Changelog: v3.4.2...v3.4.3

entry.title: starter-kit-essentials
entry.content: Le noyau du starter kit : 6 skills génériques développeur (revue de code à divulgation progressive, stratégie de test, vérification, débogage systématique, discipline d'agent, qualité de commit) + les 4 subagents à mémoire de projet.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,852 supported skills.

entry.title: stromy
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Stromy branded deliverables — composes nl-gov-data intel/analysis + stromy-format rendering + markdown-canvas deliverable planning over Stromy's brand

entry.title: cowork-to-code-bridge
entry.content: Connect Claude Cowork to Claude Code on your own computer (macOS or Linux). Cowork hands a task to a local Claude Code agent (and can run approved scripts too); the bridge is idempotent, streams progress, and is token-protected. Install with one command; it sets up a global Cowork skill so every session connects automatically — no /plugin, no setup inside Cowork.

entry.title: kratos
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestrator for features, research, and project insights

entry.title: orchestra
entry.content: Governance-first specialist skill framework for routed, auditable AI coding workflows.

entry.title: agent-codebase-skills
entry.content: Layered memory for AI agents in long-lived codebases: AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md conventions, auto session notes, concurrent-safe task management

entry.title: sos-memory
entry.content: Durable cross-agent memory toolkit for Claude, Codex, Gemini, QMD, vault project pages, daily notes, decisions, and continues handoffs.

entry.title: harness-claude
entry.content: Lean full-SDLC Claude Code harness — Discover, Plan, Implement, Verify, Maintain — with a vague-intent discovery entry above /spec, subagent orchestration, memory persistence, a product/UX + system design altitude, benchmark-gated cost/token optimization, guarded long-running agent runs, multi-agent parallel fan-out, a bug-fix fast lane, and a release & feedback loop (deploy + observe) that closes the pipeline.

entry.title: provenship
entry.content: End-to-end development pipeline: brainstorm -> plan -> build (TDD, subagents) -> review -> browser QA (UI + API) -> evidence-rich finalize -> ship. Hand it a requirement, get back a PR with proof.

entry.title: redteam
entry.content: Adversarial agent-pair harness: one model writes code (plan → implement), a second model reviews it adversarially; the draft PR is the human checkpoint before merge (a single-model test-first TDD mode is also available).

entry.title: ai-config
entry.content: d-morrison's personal Claude Code skills (PR/review workflow, grading, reprexes, R-package helpers) and slash commands.

entry.title: piflow
entry.content: Pi Flow — author, enhance, and run structured filesystem-coordinated workflows (a DAG of producer/verify nodes) as a fleet of efficient pi agents driven by non-Claude coding-plan models, with Claude Code as the single console. Three skills: piflow-init (create a workflow), piflow-enhance (improve it), piflow-start (run + monitor it).

entry.title: cc-transcript
entry.content: Investigate Claude Code transcripts token-efficiently via the cc-transcript CLI: list, stats, grep, and show instead of reading raw JSONL.

entry.title: aicoach-framework
entry.content: Multi-agent AI coach for endurance & strength athletes — runs entirely inside Claude Code.

entry.title: tregusti-skills
entry.content: Personal Claude Code skills for software development workflows

entry.title: xentral-connector
entry.content: Xentral Agent OS — connector and skills.

entry.title: axhub
entry.content: Korean-first Claude Code plugin for axhub. onboarding/bootstrap/deploy/import/development/diagnosis/clarity/update 8개 스킬이 ax-hub-cli v0.20.0+ 표면(hidden plugin-support 그룹 + 공개 deploy verify·diagnose·update)을 직접 호출해요. update 는 사전 안내 문장 없이 `현재 버전을 확인할게요.` 로 바로 시작해요. import 는 기존 로컬 앱 가져오기를, diagnosis 는 배포 실패 원인 요약을 담당하고, preview-confirm 배포와 verify 기반 성공 선언을 제공해요.

entry.title: claude-mem-lite
entry.content: Persistent long-term memory for Claude Code via MCP — captures coding decisions, bugfixes, and context across sessions. Hybrid FTS5 + TF-IDF search with episode batching. Single SQLite DB, no external services. A lighter, lower-cost alternative to claude-mem (episode batching + a smaller model; cost savings are an internal estimate, not a measured benchmark).

entry.title: jk
entry.content: GitHub CLI-style interface for Jenkins controllers - create multibranch jobs, inspect config.xml, and manage runs, logs, artifacts, credentials, nodes, and queues

entry.title: theorems-harness-product
entry.content: Agent delivery surface for Theorems Harness capabilities, hooks, and MCP facade.

entry.title: claude-code-stack
entry.content: Orchestration stack: foreman + subagents, session/handoff skills, cost & brevity guardrails, and design/data toolchains. Skills are gated at runtime by .claude/stack-config.json.

entry.title: autumn
entry.content: Domain knowledge, CLI wrappers, scaffolding commands, and code review for the autumn-web Rust framework

entry.title: t3
entry.content: Personal code factory for multi-repo projects

entry.title: spec-driven-jp
entry.content: Hybrid pipeline for spec-driven development with Japanese design documents + Figma. Wraps GitHub Spec Kit with design-intake, code-reviewer, security-reviewer, and glossary-steward agents.

entry.title: typescript-refactor
entry.content: JavaScript-to-TypeScript refactor planning specialist, running on the session model (always the strongest available Claude). Dispatches a full team of 7 read-only senior planner agents in sequential waves (inventory, target architecture, migration slicing, verification) to produce an evidence-tagged phased migration plan, scrum-master-format per-story markdown files, Mermaid dependency DAG, and dispatch wave plan. Grounded in embedded TypeScript reference files covering strict mode, modules, build tooling, testing, monorepos, security, and migration doctrine. Cutting-edge TS practices: strict + noUncheckedIndexedAccess + exactOptionalPropertyTypes, verbatimModuleSyntax, erasable-syntax-only, Zod at boundaries, branded types, Drizzle/Prisma, Fastify/Hono, Vitest, pnpm + turborepo, type-coverage CI gates.

entry.title: overcast
entry.content: Give any agent senses (video/audio/image understanding) and OSINT reach (search/capture/monitor), organized around an investigation case. Built on pi with the tinycloud/Cloudglue perception backend.

entry.title: y2
entry.content: A minimal Claude plugin written in Python that implements hook handlers and logs all hook invocations.

entry.title: open-second-brain
entry.content: Plugin-first second brain package for AI agents and humans.

entry.title: apple-ui-craft
entry.content: Principal-engineer-grade Apple UI craft for iOS 26. Seven agents, running on the session model (always the strongest available Claude), that design, review, optimize, and craft SwiftUI so it feels like Apple built it -- Liquid Glass, spring animation, intentional haptics, accessibility from birth, SwiftUI performance, and deep platform + cross-platform integration (widgets, Live Activities, App Intents, Apple Intelligence, WebView, watchOS/tvOS/visionOS/CarPlay). Six skills: design-ios (greenfield screen/flow creation), review-ios-ui (HIG + visual + interaction audit), optimize-ios-ui (animation + haptics + performance tuning), craft-ios-ui (full 5-specialist team sweep), audit-accessibility (deep a11y audit), integrate-platform (system-integration audit). Backed by a self-contained reference library across 12 domains (see ARCHITECTURE.md) distilled from an 88-document iOS vault (~103,000 lines), a Context7-verified version-floor registry, GoodMem learnings, and serena navigation. Under ultracode the session model conducts, and Sonnet-5-xhigh executor teams run the scoped grunt stages. Read-only review by default; findings apply only on explicit user approval.

entry.title: sombra
entry.content: Living documentation and research workflows powered by Sombra

entry.title: agent-reachout
entry.content: Multi-provider notification plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: stackchanmcp
entry.content: Stack-chan physical event channel for Claude Code — touch tap / stroke notifications from the desktop robot delivered as Channels messages.

entry.title: xysq
entry.content: Consent-first persistent memory for AI agents

entry.title: soapbox-agent
entry.content: Soapbox core sustainability intelligence — RSRA, CRREM pathways, retrofit advisor, and report template engine. Skills, agents, and MCP tools for real estate sustainability teams.

entry.title: mattpocock-skills
entry.content: mattpocock-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: loupe
entry.content: Full-text code search skill for Claude Code — substring and regex across UTF-8/Shift_JIS/EUC-JP files. Uses MCP tools when available, falls back to loupe CLI.

entry.title: bitwize-music
entry.content: AI music generation workflow for Suno - album concepts, lyrics, prompts, mastering, release

entry.title: pve-bindsnap
entry.content: Snapshot and clone Proxmox LXC containers that have bind/device mounts. Ships the proxmox-bindsnap skill: install, verify, configure (BINDSNAP- markers, checksum guard) and operate pve-bindsnap.

entry.title: ospec-workflow
entry.content: Spec-Driven Development workflow for VS Code Agent Customization with OpenSpec, strict TDD, phase agents, skills, hooks, and verification contracts.

entry.title: typescript-ui
entry.content: TypeScript 6 UI engineering team. Designs, reviews, optimizes, and improves UI code so it looks like a human design team built it — distinctive aesthetic point-of-view, OKLCH color systems, variable typography, motion with spring physics, sub-2.5s LCP, sub-200ms INP, sub-0.1 CLS, and TS6 strict-mode type safety with branded primitives, discriminated unions, and exhaustiveness. Six specialists (design architect, design reviewer, performance engineer, TypeScript engineer, anti-AI auditor, team lead), running on the session model, backed by self-contained references on TS6, Tailwind v4 + OKLCH + APCA, anti-AI-aesthetic patterns, Core Web Vitals, WCAG 2.2 + reduced motion, and component architecture (compound, polymorphic, slot). Four user-invoked skills: typescript-design-ui, typescript-review-ui, typescript-optimize-ui, typescript-improve-ui. Read-only by default; the orchestrator applies findings only on explicit user approval.

entry.title: network-ai
entry.content: Gives Claude Code a multi-agent coordination layer over MCP — an atomic shared blackboard (locked propose/validate/commit), permission gating with HMAC/Ed25519-signed tokens, federated token-budget tracking, and append-only audit-log queries. Backed by an orchestrator with 32 framework adapters (LangChain, AutoGen, CrewAI, Gemini, and more).

entry.title: wikify
entry.content: Turn a folder of documents into a navigable, evidence-grounded wiki, with corpus and wiki MCP search tools.

entry.title: boca-plugin
entry.content: Ferramentas criadas para usar no Claude Code

entry.title: windbg-mcp
entry.content: WinDbg/DbgEng debugging: crash dumps, live user-mode and kernel, and Time Travel Debugging (TTD) — MCP server plus a skill that drives it.

entry.title: astria
entry.content: Generate images and video, manage references (tunes) and packs, and write prompts with the Astria API. Bundles the `astria` CLI so no environment variables are needed — run `astria login` once.

entry.title: keel
entry.content: Keel — an AI fractional-CTO advisor for product builders who don't have a senior technical voice in the room. Eight skills across the founder journey: first-build-scope, feature-decision, tech-evaluation, architecture-review, deep-review (repo-aware four-lens flagship), enterprise-ready, estimate-check, investor-dd-prep — plus a per-project decision ledger (.keel/) that remembers decisions, assumptions, and revisit-triggers across sessions. Grounded in the persona at cto-persona.md; frameworks load on demand via frameworks/INDEX.md; prescribes first-party tools instead of rebuilding them (ecosystem-tools.md).

entry.title: rn-dev-agent
entry.content: AI agent that fully tests React Native features on simulator/emulator — navigates the app, verifies UI, walks user flows, and confirms internal state.

entry.title: fno
entry.content: Set a target. Say f[no] to mostly done.

entry.title: apartment-finder
entry.content: Multi-agent apartment search: a main-context orchestrator fans out parallel profiler subagents that score listings against a weighted preference profile, with a deterministic floor for acoustics/HVAC, geo-noise, flood risk, and cost.

entry.title: ladder
entry.content: Personal growth companion — turns intentions into externally-bound commitments, tracks progress with honest data, and refuses to let rationalizations go unchallenged. Calibrated to your personality via the Enneagram.

entry.title: biz
entry.content: Bootstrapped SaaS CEO companion — brings the scar tissue, frameworks, and push-back of a repeat founder to every business decision. Keeps you honest about numbers, ruthless about scope, and focused on shipping.

entry.title: rebeca-elmudesi
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Rebeca Elmudesi — branded presentations and documents about her art via stromy-format, plus self-service website and brand asset editing via asset-broker

entry.title: cc-skills
entry.content: AI Agent Skills

entry.title: ironlabs
entry.content: AI video production skills — creative direction, generation, editing, and e-commerce content

entry.title: clickup
entry.content: ClickUp CLI with 31 agent skills covering the full API -- token-efficient alternative to MCP with chat, time tracking, docs, and project management workflows

entry.title: ripple
entry.content: Agent video editing: transcription-driven cuts, frame-sheet eyes, HDR-safe finishing, deterministic QA, and a persistent taste memory (VIDEO.md). Routes motion graphics to HyperFrames or Remotion.

entry.title: andrej-karpathy-skills
entry.content: Behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls

entry.title: framedash
entry.content: Analyze your game telemetry with Claude Code. Bundles the Framedash MCP server (read-only analytics tools), a SQL query cookbook over the events schema, CLI usage patterns, and perf-diff CI recipes.

entry.title: chronicle
entry.content: Lossless recorder for Claude Code sessions — raw JSONL + markdown + SQLite/FTS, captured by an external daemon with an in-session health watchdog.

entry.title: scr
entry.content: LLM-augmented local-diff reviewer. /scr:review opens an interactive side-by-side viewer with fold annotations, semantic-group sidebar, and round-trips inline comments back into the session.

entry.title: braynee
entry.content: Braynee turns Claude Code into your second brain — setup wizard, PARA vault scaffolding, company knowledge base, project detection, all-time usage insights, and daily workflow skills. Requires Claude Code ≥ 2.1.85 (hooks use the `if` field for tool/argument scoping).

entry.title: microsoft-365-mcp
entry.content: Multi-account, token-efficient MCP for Outlook mail + Calendar + OneDrive via Microsoft Graph. 33 tools, Keychain-backed tokens.

entry.title: telegram
entry.content: Telegram channel for Claude Code — messaging bridge with built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /telegram:access.

entry.title: oh-my-claudecode
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestration system for Claude Code

entry.title: projected-source
entry.content: Create living documentation from code using projected-source templates

entry.title: usap-skills
entry.content: Unified Security Agent Platform — 79 cybersecurity skills + 12 cs-* orchestrator agents that emit a typed 11-field JSON output contract, mapped to MITRE ATT&CK and NIST CSF 2.0. Runs in any LLM. Bundles 7 slash commands (usap:run, usap:fortigate, usap:orchestrate, usap:challenge, usap:compare, usap:test, usap:README) and 6 user-invocable orchestrator skills (Alex, CISO, DevSecOps, Incident Responder, Program Manager, Red Team).

entry.title: clawdcursor
entry.content: Safe cross-OS desktop & browser control for Claude Code — the fallback execution layer for when APIs, CLIs, and direct integrations aren't available. Registers the clawdcursor MCP server in compact mode and bundles its usage skill (the SKILL.md at the repo root). Requires Node.js 20+; the MCP server launches via npx, which fetches clawdcursor on demand (or uses your global install if present) — no separate install step.

entry.title: essentials
entry.content: Codebase-agnostic code-review and quality primitives: security, logic, performance, lint, dead-code, dependency, copy, UI, migration, route, webhook, docs, and test agents; an orchestrated /code-review; git commit/PR helpers; evidence-first triage skills; and a /first-run profile that tailors them all to your stack. Stack-detecting — works on any language or framework.

entry.title: crucible-suite
entry.content: Complete writing system for epic fantasy novels using the Crucible Structureâ€”a 36-beat narrative framework with three interwoven story strands. Includes planning, outlining, prose writing with bi-chapter reviews, and editing.

entry.title: hephaestus
entry.content: Shared tooling plugin for the HomericIntelligence ecosystem. Ships 23 skills: skill-advisor, advise, learn, myrmidon-swarm, brainstorm, test-driven-development, systematic-debugging, verification, git-worktrees, finish-branch, code-review, repo-analyze, repo-analyze-quick, repo-analyze-strict, repo-analyze-full, repo-analyze-quick-full, repo-analyze-strict-full, review-pr-strict, worktree-cleanup, tidy, create-reusable-utilities, github-actions-python-cicd, and python-repo-modernization.

entry.title: zensu
entry.content: Product Lifecycle Manager — Features as First-Class Citizens

entry.title: squirrelscan
entry.content: Website audit tool for SEO, performance, security & 230+ rules

entry.title: clover
entry.content: Protect your coding agent experience — Clover silently threat-models every plan, surfaces missing security requirements, and folds them in before code is written.

entry.title: better-godot-mcp
entry.content: Comprehensive Godot Engine integration — 17 tools for game development

entry.title: food-planner
entry.content: Weekly meal planning automation: Cookidoo recipe + meal-plan + shopping-list orchestration with German supermarket offer integration (lidl, kaufland, penny, edeka, rewe)

entry.title: cold-shower
entry.content: Reality check for vibe-coded apps. 6 audits → Vibe Score 0-100. Plan-gate blocks edits until approved. Persistent second brain across sessions.

entry.title: claude-code-memory
entry.content: Claude Codeの記憶を外部DBに保存し、セッション間で知識・決定事項・アクティビティを永続化する

entry.title: legal-skills
entry.content: 面向法律从业者的 Claude Skills 集合，包含文档转换、音频转录、网页抓取等专业工具

entry.title: open-skills
entry.content: 开放技能库：工作流、性能优化、Jira、Git 等 Claude Code Skills

entry.title: gigachang-skills
entry.content: A collection of skills for personal daily workflows

entry.title: standaarden
entry.content: CONCEPT — Skills voor Nederlandse overheidsstandaarden (beheerd door Logius): API Design Rules, Digikoppeling, OAuth NL, FSC, Logboek Dataverwerkingen, CloudEvents, BOMOS, E-Government en Publicatie-tooling. Bevat 10 skills voor 77 GitHub repositories verdeeld over 9 domeinen.

entry.title: claude-2x-statusline
entry.content: Modular statusline for Claude Code — peak hours, rate limits, rolling-window burn rate, cache reuse, plus a hook-injected narrator (rules + optional Haiku) that surfaces context-management advice above your prompt. Bilingual (English/Hebrew, locale auto-detect).

entry.title: alfred-agent
entry.content: Alfred Agent Workflow - messaging, coordination, ECR, and RSI for the Alfred platform

entry.title: darrylagostinelli
entry.content: Code review, audits, and parallel task execution workflow. Bundles slash commands and reviewer subagents.

entry.title: wet-mcp
entry.content: Web search, content extraction, and media download

entry.title: agmsg
entry.content: Cross-agent messaging via SQLite. Send messages between CLI AI agents. No daemon, no network.

entry.title: huhhb
entry.content: Uhstray.io skills marketplace — curated Claude Code skills including uhh:memory.

entry.title: optimize-anything
entry.content: Optimize any text artifact using gepa — prompts, code, configs, skills

entry.title: elements-of-style
entry.content: Writing guidance based on William Strunk Jr.'s The Elements of Style (1918)

entry.title: kimi
entry.content: Claude Code plugin that delegates read-only review, challenge, free-form ask, and write-capable rescue work to the local kimi-code CLI. Includes an opt-in stop-time review gate and a PreToolUse hook that enforces per-command safety.

entry.title: memex-garden
entry.content: Search and save content in your Memex library through the hosted Memex MCP server and bundled memex-agent-skill.

entry.title: claude-session-store
entry.content: Session-scoped scratch storage for Claude Code. Provides $CLAUDE_SESSION_DIR — a temp directory any tool can read/write, automatically cleaned up on session end.

entry.title: ai4comms
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for AI4comms branded deliverables

entry.title: agent-toolkit
entry.content: Personal Claude Code plugin — curated skills toolkit

entry.title: codex-orchestrator
entry.content: Orchestrate OpenAI Codex from Claude: delegate implementation work in supervised checkpoint slices with server-enforced quality gates, persistent plans/hypotheses, worktree isolation and per-task model/effort control.

entry.title: tt-awesome
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for the Awesome Tenstorrent list. Provides /tt-awesome:add-project to guide contributors through submitting new entries.

entry.title: code-abyss
entry.content: 26 domain skills + 5 verification tools for security-first full-stack engineering. Covers security, architecture, DevOps, AI, mobile, office docs, frontend design, and multi-agent coordination.

entry.title: session-sync
entry.content: Cross-device synchronization for Claude Code sessions and settings via iCloud Drive

entry.title: agentic-mind-palace
entry.content: Agentic Mind Palace — a PARA-powered Notion integration for Claude Code. Query tasks, notes, tags, and projects through natural language.

entry.title: silver-bullet
entry.content: Agentic Process Orchestrator for AI-native Software Engineering & DevOps. Provides SB-owned lifecycle workflows, optional extension-plugin boundaries, and layered technical compliance.

entry.title: my-mac-claude
entry.content: Combined Claude skills library for macOS: Anthropic examples, Superpowers workflows, Matt Pocock skills, gstack browser-testing, and token-efficient profiles

entry.title: interface-design
entry.content: Design engineering for Claude Code. Build interfaces with craft, memory, and consistency. Maintains design decisions across sessions.

entry.title: hypo
entry.content: LLM-native personal wiki system — session-aware knowledge base for Claude Code

entry.title: loop-review
entry.content: Iterative independent review-and-fix loop for task-scoped git changes.

entry.title: unifable
entry.content: A harness that makes Opus (or any Claude/Codex model) behave like Fable: completion, evidence, and verification enforced as procedure, auto-routed per task. Native plugin on Claude Code and Codex (hooks self-contained). Fork of fivetaku/fablize.

entry.title: supeRpowers
entry.content: Comprehensive R programming assistant for Claude Code — tidyverse-first data analysis, package development, Shiny, statistics, and biostatistics.

entry.title: clickhouse-best-practices
entry.content: 28 best practice rules for ClickHouse schema design, query optimization, and data ingestion — prioritized by impact

entry.title: openclaw-docs
entry.content: Authoritative, daily-refreshed OpenClaw documentation lookup. Bundles a Claude skill (with local lookup CLI + flattened markdown indexes) and a hosted MCP server (vector + trigram search, structural field-check, section extraction, version listing). Use to ground OpenClaw factual claims and prevent hallucinated config fields.

entry.title: webde-access
entry.content: Private full-access Web.de mailbox connector for Codex, Claude Code, and Kimi Code.

entry.title: ivuorinen-skills
entry.content: Hostile audit skills for Claude Code: adversarial code review, architecture detection and auditing, and documentation verification.

entry.title: npm
entry.content: NPM Registry client — query and manage packages, versions, dist-tags, downloads, access, stars, tokens, webhooks, orgs, and audit. Supports publish, unpublish, deprecate, custom registry, 8 mirrors, proxy, and auth token.

entry.title: hyperframes
entry.content: HyperFrames by HeyGen. Write HTML, render video. Compositions, GSAP and runtime adapter animations, captions, voiceovers, audio-reactive visuals, and website-to-video capture for HyperFrames.

entry.title: aigentry-devkit
entry.content: AI development environment kit: skills, hooks, MCP servers, and HUD for Claude Code and Codex CLI

entry.title: skillsaw
entry.content: A configurable linter for agent skills, plugins, and AI coding assistant context

entry.title: rawgentic
entry.content: 6 SDLC workflow skills + 4 workspace management + 1 planning skill + 2 security skills + hooks for Claude Code: project registration, setup, session binding, requirements interviewing, issue creation, feature implementation, bug fixing, adversarial review, incident response, peer consultation, whole-tree security scanning, security pattern syncing, and dangerous pattern blocking with per-project exceptions.

entry.title: emdx
entry.content: Knowledge base skills for Claude Code. Save research, maintain session memory, and keep knowledge current across conversations.

entry.title: ai-dev-team
entry.content: Spec-driven AI development workflow: KB-centric specs, dual-model audit (Claude + Codex), execution workdocs with per-step compliance checks

entry.title: omni-ai-mcp
entry.content: Multi-AI MCP bridge: Gemini + 400+ models via OpenRouter. 20 tools: text, code, image, video, TTS, RAG, Deep Research.

entry.title: cesium-mcp
entry.content: AI-powered 3D globe control for Claude Code — load tilesets, fly to locations, style layers, and query spatial data with natural language

entry.title: telegram
entry.content: claude-tg — drive Claude Code from Telegram. Built-in access control; manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /telegram:access.

entry.title: vela-slides
entry.content: Create, edit, translate, rebrand, or present slide decks. Use when the user wants presentations, slides, decks, or keynotes — even without mentioning Vela by name.

entry.title: koyuki
entry.content: Kurosaki Koyuki mode. The pink-gremlin debugger who cracks what's stuck: read the error, get a repro, bet the likeliest suspect, probe one change, prove the fix. Chaotic, not reckless. Nihahaha!

entry.title: claude-witness
entry.content: A quiet observer that tracks how you grow and change as you work — your thinking, workstyle, habits, and the patterns you climb out of. Coach-oriented, not clone. Person-centric growth archive with pluggable per-repo lenses.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,425 supported skills.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Universal agentic skill library for Claude Code with 1,254+ reusable skills across coding, security, design, product, and operations workflows.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,396 supported skills.

entry.title: doc-mirror
entry.content: The doc-mirror claude system: a 1:1 documentation mirror of any codebase, maintained by an invariant doc-mirror STATE MACHINE (per-module doc(m), 6 context/ index files, fork-on-change, no random documents). Bundles doc-mirror-boot (entry + core-loop prime + router), the doc-mirror-{init,seework,change,prompts} state-skills, doc-mirror-install (the host-setup WIZARD), ship-a-plugin (the build+distribute dev-flow), doc-mirror (THE LAW), and make-ai-operating-system (the architect for new systems of this class); the brainhook work-loop + session-start + transition-guard + readonly-guard hooks (plugin-native via CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT); the journal/projects/vision/plan/tracker/commit/cursor + docmirror-search CLI tools; and the doc-mirror law + behavior rules.

entry.title: notion-agent
entry.content: Zero-overhead Notion API CLI for AI agents — db, page, block, comment, search, user commands. No MCP token overhead.

entry.title: compass-mcp
entry.content: Compass real-estate access for Claude — search listings, get property details, market reports, your saved homes

entry.title: kagura-memory
entry.content: Kagura Memory Cloud plugin — restore session context, recall & save durable project knowledge, setup help, and an MCP smoke test

entry.title: typo3-ddev
entry.content: DDEV setup for TYPO3 extension development

entry.title: mssql-performance-skills
entry.content: 26 SQL Server performance tuning skills for Claude Code — static T-SQL analysis, execution plans, wait stats, deadlock, query store, AG health, AG configuration, ERRORLOG, SPN, memory, disk I/O, encryption, configuration drift, setup bootstrap log, SSRS trace log review, and migration readiness

entry.title: uipath
entry.content: UiPath plugin for Claude Code — custom skills, agents, hooks, and MCP servers for UiPath RPA workflows, UI automation, UI testing, Python coded agents and UiPath troubleshoot

entry.title: agent
entry.content: Turn Claude Code into a persistent agent — memory, personality, voice, messaging, and more.

entry.title: ego-avatar
entry.content: Kaiju Ego Avatar: Token-saving AI persona with Gluttony and Aura skills

entry.title: crw
entry.content: Scrape, crawl, map, search, parse, extract, and change-track the web with fastCRW — the open-source, self-hostable Firecrawl alternative. Single Rust binary, ~6 MB RAM, Firecrawl-compatible /v1 + /v2 API, bundled SearXNG search.

entry.title: mattpocock-skills
entry.content: mattpocock-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: monk
entry.content: Deploy and operate full applications with Monk DevOps Agent — cloud infra, SaaS integrations, and containerized workloads — from one chat. Bundles the monk skill and blocks accidental `monk` CLI shell-outs that would desync cluster state.

entry.title: vibe-replay
entry.content: Generate interactive HTML replays of AI coding sessions. Record, share, and replay your Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex sessions.

entry.title: agentic-patterns
entry.content: Streams all 26 Claude Code lifecycle events (tool calls, permissions, subagents, compaction, sessions) into the @agentic-patterns/server dashboard for live observability, and ships the `build-on-agentic-patterns` skill (how to register + build agents on the framework). Pair with `ap playground`. See https://github.com/pattern-stack/agentic-patterns-ts/blob/main/docs/CLAUDE-CODE-PLUGIN-ACTIVATION.md for activation + troubleshooting.

entry.title: issueboss
entry.content: IssueBoss project issue tracking — skills for connecting to the IssueBoss MCP and working issues through the pipeline

entry.title: mos
entry.content: MindrianOS -- Your AI innovation co-founder. Larry thinks with you through PWS methodology, builds your Data Room as you explore, and chains frameworks intelligently. Install and go.

entry.title: rundale-dev
entry.content: Parish engine + Rundale game-content authoring kit. Bundles skills (check/prove/play/land/drain-backlog/rundale-geo-tool/...), session hooks (auto-fmt, quality gates, cadence reminders), the parish-mcp bridge, and LSP wiring (rust-analyzer + svelte + typescript) so contributors get the same Claude Code setup as the maintainer.

entry.title: quarry-dev
entry.content: Local semantic search for Claude Code: /find, /ingest, /remember, /explain, /source, /quarry

entry.title: codeops
entry.content: Universal AI-development workflow: planning, requirements engineering, reverse-engineering, disambiguation, preflight audits, architecture docs, roadmaps, upgrades, and git commit flows. Ported from codeops-mcp.

entry.title: pyscn-mcp
entry.content: Python code quality analysis MCP server

entry.title: anthropic-docs
entry.content: Auto-updated multi-skill reference for the whole Anthropic doc ecosystem. 8 skills covering claude-code, claude-agent-sdk, anthropic-api, anthropic-platform-features, claude-connectors, claude-cowork, mcp-spec, and anthropic-pulse (news + research digests). Pipeline refreshes daily.

entry.title: atolye
entry.content: Personal app-creation suite: a staged pipeline from idea validation to design, stack, MVP, technical planning, frictionless implementation, and monetization.

entry.title: pad
entry.content: A shared knowledge base for developers and AI agents. Provides slash commands to save, load, search, and brainstorm with project planning documents stored in Pad.

entry.title: claudecode-for-me
entry.content: Claude Code 커스텀 스킬/커맨드 모음 플러그인

entry.title: Buddy
entry.content: Persistent AI coding companion with 21 species and personality stats.

entry.title: agi-super-team
entry.content: Virtual C-Suite of AI executives powered by legendary minds, with 1,651 skills

entry.title: river-review
entry.content: Capability pack that strengthens AI review for Claude Code: your team's review criteria as versioned, repo-owned skills (a Skill Registry), driven by a review agent that runs perspective-based reviewer roles (code, security, performance, architecture, testing, adversarial) and verifies findings against the diff so humans keep the high-risk judgment.

entry.title: prompt-pocket
entry.content: Cross-agent prompt pocket: remember your most-used prompts and pick one to run; auto-scans Claude Code, Codex and OpenCode sessions to record prompts repeated 7+ times. Forged by agent-plugin-kit.

entry.title: ace
entry.content: AI Connect Engine — orchestrates the ACE lifecycle from idea through app building, Connect setup, LLO management, and closeout
